title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.676 - Sergeant Robert Wayne Crow Jr. Memorial Armory designated in Joplin
text:
41.676.  Sergeant Robert Wayne Crow Jr. Memorial Armory designated in Joplin. — The National Guard armory located in or nearest to Joplin shall be designated as the "Sergeant Robert Wayne Crow Jr. Memorial Armory".
(L. 2021 S.B. 258)
